//: The ttsc/Go lowering config read by @ttsc/unplugin/bun during the Bun.build JS emit (build.ts): server-report.ts uses the tokenless resolve<T>()/tryResolve<T>()/isService<T>() sugar. Stage selection is declare-by-depending, resolved HOST-SIDE (§100): there is no `plugins` array, so ttsc auto-discovery spawns the one owner host (transforms/cmd/ttsc-std) from this lib's direct di.extras devDep, and the host self-selects the full stage set from its own dependency scan — the generic inline stage plus the primitive stages inline/nameof/signatureof/keyof/valueof/singular/factory/fold/mergesynth reached through di.extras's honest primitives.extras dep (there are no bespoke di / di_options / config stages any more — W6p3 deleted them). resolve<T>()/tryResolve<T>()/isService<T>() are all substituted from di.extras's rhombus.inline bodies (the same host scan collects them), then the primitive stages lower the resulting tokenfor/keyof calls under the fixed-point loop; mergesynth is inert here (this lib installs no augmentation). Extends the base tsconfig. The `types` augmentation is RETAINED: the tokenless `resolve<T>()` sugar is NOT a real di.core IResolver method — it lives in di.extras's `declare module '@rhombus-std/di.core'` augment, and declaration-site matching anchors on that sugar overload, so the augment must be in the Go program. Lint and d.ts emit stay on plain tsc via the base tsconfig.json.
